help_text: ℹ️ Help This bot allows you to submit appeals to our support team. 📨 New Appeal — start a new appeal. You can attach text, photos, videos, voice messages, documents, audio, location, or contacts. 📂 My Appeals — view the status and history of your appeals. 🌐 Change Language — switch the interface language. Once you submit an appeal, our staff will review it and reply directly here in the bot.
banned_message: ⛔ You have been banned from using this bot. If you think this is a mistake, please contact the administration through another channel.
flood_wait: ⏳ Please slow down and wait a moment before sending another message.
error_generic: ⚠️ Something went wrong. Please try again later.
new_appeal_prompt:
📝 Please describe your appeal.

You can send text, photo, video, voice message, document, audio, location or contact. You may send multiple attachments.
new_appeal_received_item: ✅ Received. Do you want to attach more files?
new_appeal_empty: ⚠️ Please send at least some text or an attachment before finishing.
new_appeal_created: ✅ Your appeal has been submitted! 🆔 Appeal ID: #{appeal_number:06d} Our team will review it and reply here as soon as possible.
new_appeal_unsupported_content: ⚠️ This type of content is not supported. Please send text, photo, video, voice, document, audio, location or contact.
my_appeals_empty: 📭 You don't have any appeals yet.
admin_only: ⛔ This command is only available to administrators.
group_only: ⚠️ This command can only be used inside the staff group.
broadcast_prompt: 📢 Send the message you want to broadcast to all users (text, photo, video or document).
broadcast_confirm: 📢 Confirm broadcast This message will be sent to {count} users. Continue?
broadcast_started: 📤 Broadcast started. This may take a while...
search_prompt: 🔎 Enter Appeal ID, Telegram ID, username, name or phone number to search:
ban_prompt: 🚫 Enter the Telegram ID or username of the user to ban:
unban_prompt: ✅ Enter the Telegram ID or username of the user to unban:
reply_failed: ⚠️ Failed to deliver the reply to the user (they may have blocked the bot).
phone_share_prompt: 📱 Please share your phone number to continue (optional).
